datasets.name: PDEBench
datasets.description: Scientific HDF5 provider family for time-dependent PDE benchmarks
notes: PDEBench Hub repositories contain scientific HDF5 files, not a tabular datasets.load_dataset schema.
Small-compute loading selectively downloads one HDF5 file and splits by trajectory.

datasets.name: CFDBench
datasets.description: Case-archive provider for CFD boundary, property, and geometry shifts
notes: The raw Hub repository stores scenario case ZIP archives; generic datasets.load_dataset is not the execution path.
NAVIER-CFD downloads one selected case archive and never executes pickle payloads.

datasets.name: RealPDEBench
datasets.description: Paired real and simulated trajectories stored as scenario-level Arrow shards
notes: The Hub release uses saved Arrow trajectories and JSON indexes under scenario folders.
Small-compute mode downloads selected Arrow shards and labels its splits as subset splits, not official full-data splits.

datasets.name: AirfRANS
datasets.description: RANS airfoil geometry and operating-condition benchmark
notes: Pin dataset revisions and record provider-specific subset rules.

datasets.name: DrivAerNet++
notes: Pin dataset revisions and record provider-specific subset rules.

datasets.name: DrivAerML
notes: Pin dataset revisions and record provider-specific subset rules.

datasets.name: The Well
datasets.description: Provider family for diverse large-scale physics simulations
notes: The Well is a provider family, not one datasets.load_dataset repository.
Supply an individual well_dataset_name and preserve official train/valid/test splits.

notes: Pin dataset revisions and record provider-specific subset rules.
